title: Macropsychanthus ruddiae

It belongs to the genus Macropsychanthus, which is native to the Pacific island of New Caledonia. This species is further classified as a flowering plant, specifically a dicotyledon, which means it has two seed leaves in its seedling stage. Macropsychanthus ruddiae is an important part of its native ecosystem in New Caledonia, providing food and shelter for local wildlife.
